prompt: A highly detailed Vogue Hong Kong magazine cover featuring East Asian model Fish Liew with short, windswept black hair, sitting elegantly on the edge of a white luxury yacht. She is wearing a plain white short-sleeve Ralph Lauren Polo t-shirt with a small red polo player logo on the chest, paired with a flowing dark navy blue long wrap skirt with a high slit, barefoot. Her pose is relaxed and confident — one leg bent with foot resting on the yacht edge, the other leg dangling, one hand resting on her knee, the other arm leaning on the railing. Next to her is a large woven straw tote bag with bold yellow "POLO" lettering and a red knitted sweater draped over the chrome railing. The background is a vibrant deep blue ocean with gentle sparkling waves under bright daylight. The image has the classic Vogue magazine layout with large yellow "VOGUE" logo at the top, "HONG KONG" underneath, "SAIL INTO SPRING" headline, issue text "no.103.0 MARCH 2025", and "by ISSAC LAM" credit at the bottom. Cinematic lighting, sharp fashion photography style, elegant and fresh spring vibe.
